title: Bedrock World
body:
**🚀 ITITAN Hosting - Premium, Reliable & Budget-Friendly Minecraft Servers - from just €2.50/month**

Enjoy 10% off your first month with the code **JSON10**!

                       Bedrock World is a Minecraft texture pack with two main purposes



                  Purpose 1: A more challenging experience

  Using this texture pack, you can make the Minecraft game feel a bit more challenging as you cannot always idenify blocks by look. You have to idenify blocks by the shape they make (like a tree) or the colors. (Of course, you can always hover your mouse over it and check the name...)



                Purpose 2: TROLL YOUR FRIENDS! (my personal favorite)       

Using this texture pack, you can make your friend's game look weird. Of course, they could always just remove the texture pack (if they are smart enough) except the file is called Shaders+





                                                ENJOY!
